REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (302-308 27th Ave)
Off Calendar Jan-22-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Debra Dolch (Trustee).

The sale was confirmed at $2,280,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). Ms. Rasch is to calculate the amount of the additional bond which is to be submitted to the Court along with the proposed order.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition For Authority To Sell Real Property Of The Trust And For Authority To Enter Into Exclusive Listing Agreement
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for (Trustee) Debra Dolch.

Ms. Rasch confirmed that there have been no changes or objections. The Court granted the petition for Authority to Sell Real Property of the Trust and for Authority to Enter into Exclusive Listing Agreement (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
